en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: ACCORDING TO DO NOT DESTROY. A PSALM OF ASAPH. A SONG. We give thanks to you, O God; we give thanks, for your name is near. We recount your wondrous deeds.
zh: 神啊！我們稱謝你，我們稱謝你， 因為你 接近人， 人都述說你奇妙的作為。

en: "At the set time that I appoint I will judge with equity.
zh: 你說：“我選定了日期， 我要按公正施行審判。

en: When the earth totters, and all its inhabitants, it is I who keep steady its pillars. Selah
zh: 地和地上的居民都因懼怕而融化， 我卻使大地的柱子堅立。

en: I say to the boastful, 'Do not boast,' and to the wicked, 'Do not lift up your horn;
zh: 我對狂傲的人說：‘不要行事狂傲’； 對邪惡的人說：‘不要舉角，

en: do not lift up your horn on high, or speak with haughty neck.'"
zh: 不要高舉你們的角， 不要挺著傲慢的頸項說話。’”

en: For not from the east or from the west and not from the wilderness comes lifting up,
zh: 高升不是從東面來，不是從西面來， 也不是曠野來，

en: but it is God who executes judgment, putting down one and lifting up another.
zh: 而是由 神來決定； 他使這人降卑，使那人升高。

en: For in the hand of the LORD there is a cup with foaming wine, well mixed, and he pours out from it, and all the wicked of the earth shall drain it down to the dregs.
zh: 原來耶和華的手裡有杯， 裝滿了起沫和混雜各種香料的酒； 他把酒從杯裡倒出來，地上所有的惡人都必定要喝， 甚至連酒的渣滓都要喝盡。

en: But I will declare it forever; I will sing praises to the God of Jacob.
zh: 至於我，我要永遠傳揚， 我要向雅各的 神歌唱。

en: All the horns of the wicked I will cut off, but the horns of the righteous shall be lifted up.
zh: 所有惡人的角，我都要砍斷， 只有義人的角必被高舉。
